title: rosa dumalis var. biserrata
intro: Rosa dumalis var. biserrata, also known as Himalayan rose or wild rose, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. It is a woody perennial shrub that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rosa dumalis var. biserrata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
